acceptance_targets: [ch14-craft-001] Pass if a cold read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:331-347 makes clear, without needing chapter 15, that the legally operative false affidavit is void by the end of the scene. Fail if the passage still identifies the burned document as only a duplicate or leaves the county filing apparently intact.

[ch14-craft-002] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:207-212 (or a slightly widened local span) contains at least two explicit physical steps of the concealment and at least one concrete sensory consequence of moving the corpse. Fail if the burial remains mostly paraphrase, euphemism, or metaphor.

[ch14-booker-001] Pass if, after Rafe's practical-stakes outburst at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:229-244, the revised scene reaches the affidavit-destruction beat within one additional exchange and without a second abstract explanation of why truth has no cash value. Fail if the chapter still restates the same money/law argument in two separate explanatory passes before the burn.

[ch14-dialogue-001] Pass if no exchange in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:187-197 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:383-405 contains more than two consecutive monosyllabic assent/denial replies from Della, and at least two of those replies are expanded in her own practical, sensory idiom. Fail if the revised dialogue still stacks three or more bare 'Yes'/'No' answers in sequence.

[ch14-prose-001] Pass if a reread of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md finds no more than two room/kitchen-as-active-agent constructions in the chapter, and the revised replacements ground pressure in concrete bodily or environmental detail. Fail if the chapter still uses three or more such personifications to carry the same emotional work.

[FBR-002] Pass if reading `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4920-4945` and `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4986-5000` yields at least one unmistakably physical, non-euphemistic erotic memory and one concrete material detail explaining why Gabriel had power over Della. Fail if the chapter still relies on generic seduction language and summary phrasing to describe the affair.
[FBR-012] Pass if both target spans use different, scene-specific reactions and neither relies on generic stillness phrasing. Fail if either beat still resolves into pantry or person going still.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a cold read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:331-347 makes clear, without needing chapter 15, that the legally operative false affidavit is void by the end of the scene. Fail if the passage still identifies the burned document as only a duplicate or leaves the county filing apparently intact.
findings.problem: The chapter's required state change is not cleanly achieved. Rafe burns 'the duplicate of the affidavit,' not the filed county instrument, so the scene dramatizes symbolic self-punishment rather than the canonical object-state change that the continuity sheet requires. That leaves the false affidavit apparently still active in county hands and weakens the promised trade of legal strategy for estrangement.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the affidavit beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:331-347 so the operative filing is unmistakably voided in this chapter. Either make the paper in Rafe's hand the actual affidavit he can materially destroy, or add explicit withdrawal language/action in the same span that tells the reader the county filing is being cancelled and can no longer function as his claim strategy.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:207-212 (or a slightly widened local span) contains at least two explicit physical steps of the concealment and at least one concrete sensory consequence of moving the corpse. Fail if the burial remains mostly paraphrase, euphemism, or metaphor.
findings.problem: Sanitization/timidity enters at the exact moment the chapter most needs physical and moral specificity. Gabriel's death is rendered concretely, but Della's decision to hide the body gets compressed into summary and elevated phrasing ('the county's forgetting') instead of showing the ugly labor of wrapping, lifting, loading, and burying the man she is choosing to erase. For this book's constitution, that retreat is a HIGH craft failure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the concealment account in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:207-212 while staying inside the kitchen confession. Replace some summary with concrete handling details: Gabriel's dead weight, what the quilt does and does not hide, how Della and Silas move him, and one immediate bodily or sensory consequence that makes the choice costed rather than abstract.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after Rafe's practical-stakes outburst at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:229-244, the revised scene reaches the affidavit-destruction beat within one additional exchange and without a second abstract explanation of why truth has no cash value. Fail if the chapter still restates the same money/law argument in two separate explanatory passes before the burn.
findings.problem: After the confession lands, the scene explains the financial and legal uselessness of truth multiple times instead of converting that knowledge into action quickly. Rafe's debt speech already establishes the material stakes; Della then restates them in thesis form, and later restates them again before the affidavit burn. The repetition blunts the chapter's strongest causal beat by making the scene argue its own meaning instead of letting the destruction arrive sooner.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress one of the explanatory passes in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:223-250 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:325-329. After Rafe names the truck note, store debt, and dam wages, pivot more directly to the affidavit at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:331-347 so the chapter moves from revelation to consequence with less thesis repetition.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no exchange in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:187-197 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:383-405 contains more than two consecutive monosyllabic assent/denial replies from Della, and at least two of those replies are expanded in her own practical, sensory idiom. Fail if the revised dialogue still stacks three or more bare 'Yes'/'No' answers in sequence.
findings.problem: Della's stress-tell is over-literalized into repeated monosyllabic 'Yes'/'No' exchanges. One or two flat answers would fit her ceremonially calm pressure register, but the chapter reuses the same move so often that it starts to feel like a style-bible checkbox instead of live speech. The result is reduced leverage shift and less tonal variation in the confrontations with both Rafe and June.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep some blunt one-word answers, but vary the later exchanges in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:187-197 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:383-405 with Della's more character-specific diction: practical exactness, bodily fact, and evasive politeness under pressure. The goal is to preserve her discipline without flattening the exchange into repeated call-and-response.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reread of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md finds no more than two room/kitchen-as-active-agent constructions in the chapter, and the revised replacements ground pressure in concrete bodily or environmental detail. Fail if the chapter still uses three or more such personifications to carry the same emotional work.
findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on room/kitchen personification to express pressure: the room keeps a stain, tries to turn Rafe back out, shortens around Della, goes too small to air him, and finally 'had not kept any of them.' Once or twice this works; at this density it becomes a visible prose tic and substitutes generalized enclosure for fresher physical particulars.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise selected instances in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:143-151, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:299-331, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:425-427 so spatial pressure is carried by objects, heat, posture, breath, and sound rather than repeated room-as-agent phrasing. Keep the kitchen's presence, but stop making the room do the acting in more than two places.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if reading `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4920-4945` and `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4986-5000` yields at least one unmistakably physical, non-euphemistic erotic memory and one concrete material detail explaining why Gabriel had power over Della. Fail if the chapter still relies on generic seduction language and summary phrasing to describe the affair.
findings.problem: At the decisive confession, the book still renders Della and Gabriel's sexual history in euphemistic summary: "I lay with Gabriel anyway," pretty voice, gatepost talk, then back to legal aftermath. Because the paternity secret and decades of concealment depend on desire, this reads as intimacy fade-to-black sanitization in a novel otherwise willing to render blood, rot, and bodily damage.
findings.rewrite_direction: In `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4920-4945` and `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4986-5000`, replace the abstract shorthand with one or two concrete bodily memories of Gabriel's touch, where and how they met, and what Della wanted or accepted under material pressure. Keep the older Della retrospective lens, but let transaction, pleasure, shame, and self-disgust coexist in physical detail instead of cutting away at the exact point the affair should become legible.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if both target spans use different, scene-specific reactions and neither relies on generic stillness phrasing. Fail if either beat still resolves into pantry or person going still.
findings.problem: This chapter contains two separate instances of the full-book default-stillness pattern that appears in 7 chapters: "The pantry went still" and June having "gone so still." In the novel's major confession chapter, that duplicated fallback language blunts rather than sharpens the shock waves moving through the room.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework both beats in `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4894-4898` and `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4982-4985`. Give the pantry shock a material reaction rooted in jars, kettle, chair legs, or Ruthie's hands, and give June a different, observer-specific response tied to what she is doing in the pantry. Do not reuse `went still`, `so still`, or a close paraphrase in either spot.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally compromised caretaking, the bureaucratic brutality of naming, and the physical labor of moving the dead. When an edge case appears, prefer the detail a witness would remember over the phrasing a polite narrator would use. Let tenderness exist inside harsh material without cleaning the harshness off.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If childbirth, exhumation, poverty, sexual history, bodily decay, or violence enters a scene, render it through specific sensation and consequence; summarizing away the hard fact counts as a failed pass, not tasteful restraint.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High overall; contractions are the norm across dialogue, with fuller forms reserved for class performance, legal formality, deliberate emphasis, or a character trying not to lose composure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public labor chapters with quieter domestic or inventory chapters, vary scene count and dialogue density, let some chapters turn on information or paperwork rather than confrontation, and ensure no two consecutive chapters share the same dominant mechanism, pace, or emotional temperature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken historical Appalachian-Southern English without caricature; concrete, unsentimental, regionally grounded, and alert to how legal language clashes with lived speech.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Della Bledsoe, intimate enough to track bodily memory and evasive thought while never slipping into other characters' interior monologue as fact
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular work-sentence compression with longer accumulating sentences that carry memory, atmosphere, and moral weight; let cadence tighten in hearings and exhumations, then widen in domestic or reflective passages.
